languages.text: "Удивлен, что вы решились заговорить со мной вновь". {n}Себериан чуть заметно кивает вам, держась с холодной вежливостью.{/n} "Если вы, {name}, пришли, чтобы продолжить наш недавний разговор, то разочарую вас: еще не время. Ни к чему тратить драгоценные минуты на бессмысленные споры. Если же вы намерены обсудить со мной нечто иное — слушаю".

"I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."
languages.original_text: "Удивлен, что вы решились заговорить со мной вновь". {n}Себериан чуть заметно кивает вам, держась с холодной вежливостью.{/n} "Если вы, {name}, пришли, чтобы продолжить наш недавний разговор, то разочарую вас: еще не время. Ни к чему тратить драгоценные минуты на бессмысленные споры. Если же вы намерены обсудить со мной нечто иное — слушаю".

We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

"I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

"I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

languages.text: 「あなたが再び私と話すことを許したことに驚いています」{n}、セベリアンはわずかな首を傾げながら冷淡な態度を崩さず言った。{/n}「もしあなたが私たちの最近の会話を続けるために来たのなら、{name}、私はあなたを失望させることになります。まだその時ではありません。無駄な議論に貴重な時間を費やすべきではありません。しかし、何か別のことを話し合いたいのなら、私は耳を傾けます」
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが再び私と話すことを許したことに驚いています」{n}、セベリアンはわずかな首を傾げながら冷淡な態度を崩さず言った。{/n}「もしあなたが私たちの最近の会話を続けるために来たのなら、{name}、私はあなたを失望させることになります。まだその時ではありません。無駄な議論に貴重な時間を費やすべきではありません。しかし、何か別のことを話し合いたいのなら、私は耳を傾けます」

languages.text: “你居然还敢来找我谈话，真是让人意外。”{n}塞贝里安向你微微颔首，始终一副冷冰冰的模样。{/n}“如果你想继续我们之前的那番谈话，{name}，那我恐怕要让你失望了：时机未到。我们不该把宝贵的时间浪费在无谓的争执上。不过，如果你想聊点别的，我洗耳恭听。”
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: “你居然还敢来找我谈话，真是让人意外。”{n}塞贝里安向你微微颔首，始终一副冷冰冰的模样。{/n}“如果你想继续我们之前的那番谈话，{name}，那我恐怕要让你失望了：时机未到。我们不该把宝贵的时间浪费在无谓的争执上。不过，如果你想聊点别的，我洗耳恭听。”

languages.text: "Benimle tekrar konuşmaya cesaret etmene şaşırdım." {n}Seberian, soğuk tavrını koruyarak sana belli belirsiz bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Eğer son konuşmamıza devam etmek için geldiysen {name}, o zaman hayal kırıklığına uğrayacaksın. Henüz zamanı değil. Değerli dakikalarımızı meyve vermeyecek tartışmalarla ziyan etmemeliyiz. Ancak başka bir şeyi konuşmak istersen dinliyorum."
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: "Benimle tekrar konuşmaya cesaret etmene şaşırdım." {n}Seberian, soğuk tavrını koruyarak sana belli belirsiz bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Eğer son konuşmamıza devam etmek için geldiysen {name}, o zaman hayal kırıklığına uğrayacaksın. Henüz zamanı değil. Değerli dakikalarımızı meyve vermeyecek tartışmalarla ziyan etmemeliyiz. Ancak başka bir şeyi konuşmak istersen dinliyorum."

languages.text: «Me sorprende que quiera volver a hablar conmigo». {n}Seberian asiente mínimamente, mirándote con frialdad.{/n} «Si viene a continuar nuestra anterior conversación, {name}, debo decepcionarle. No es el momento. No podemos perder nuestro valioso tiempo en disputas sin sentido. Pero si lo que quiere es hablar de otra cosa, le escucho».
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: «Me sorprende que quiera volver a hablar conmigo». {n}Seberian asiente mínimamente, mirándote con frialdad.{/n} «Si viene a continuar nuestra anterior conversación, {name}, debo decepcionarle. No es el momento. No podemos perder nuestro valioso tiempo en disputas sin sentido. Pero si lo que quiere es hablar de otra cosa, le escucho».

languages.text: « Je ne pensais pas que vous voudriez encore me parler. » {n}Seberian hoche imperceptiblement la tête en maintenant une attitude rigide et froide.{/n} « Si vous venez poursuivre notre dernière conversation, {name}, je suis au regret de vous dire que le moment n'est pas encore venu. Ne perdons pas de précieuses minutes en disputes stériles. Cependant, si vous souhaitez aborder un autre sujet, je vous écoute. »
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne pensais pas que vous voudriez encore me parler. » {n}Seberian hoche imperceptiblement la tête en maintenant une attitude rigide et froide.{/n} « Si vous venez poursuivre notre dernière conversation, {name}, je suis au regret de vous dire que le moment n'est pas encore venu. Ne perdons pas de précieuses minutes en disputes stériles. Cependant, si vous souhaitez aborder un autre sujet, je vous écoute. »

languages.text: "Ich bin überrascht, dass Ihr es wagt, erneut mit mir zu sprechen." {n}Seberian nickt dir subtil zu und gibt sich weiterhin kühl.{/n} "Wenn Ihr gekommen seid, um unser letztes Gespräch fortzusetzen, {name}, muss ich Euch enttäuschen. Es ist noch nicht so weit. Wir sollten keine kostbaren Minuten mit sinnlosen Diskussionen vergeuden. Falls Ihr etwas anderes besprechen wollt, bin ich allerdings ganz Ohr."
languages.original_text: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin überrascht, dass Ihr es wagt, erneut mit mir zu sprechen." {n}Seberian nickt dir subtil zu und gibt sich weiterhin kühl.{/n} "Wenn Ihr gekommen seid, um unser letztes Gespräch fortzusetzen, {name}, muss ich Euch enttäuschen. Es ist noch nicht so weit. Wir sollten keine kostbaren Minuten mit sinnlosen Diskussionen vergeuden. Falls Ihr etwas anderes besprechen wollt, bin ich allerdings ganz Ohr."
